positive: A whimsical illustration of bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns growing in a misty forest. Detailed watercolor style with soft pastel accents, emphasizing natural curvature and delicate glow. Cottagecore aesthetic, high depth of field, ambient light.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, digital noise
